content.fallbackNotice: Not yet available in {language} — showing English.

home.heroTitleLead: A distributed inference network powered by
home.heroSubtitle: inference.club merges local AI with the cloud — a tailnet that puts your computer on the world's largest network of distributed consumer AI hardware. After all, the cloud is just someone else's computer.
home.needsNode: You haven't put a node on the network yet — finish setup
home.topologySubtitle: inference.club is a Tailscale tailnet that joins consumer hardware — RTX PCs, the DGX Spark, Apple silicon — so members can safely expose their inference through one unified API, across the whole range of AI modalities: chat, images, video, speech, music, 3D.
home.consumerBody: Sign up, mint a token, point your client at {endpoint}. One simple API — a superset of OpenAI, NVIDIA NIM, and other popular standards — serving the best and most popular open models for every major modality.
home.providerBody: Exposing local inference usually means ngrok, Cloudflare tunnels, or a custom tangle of ports and firewall rules. Here it's one simple container: run the agent next to {vllm}, {llamacpp}, or {ollama} and it routes requests straight to your local services.
home.archSubtitle: Follow a single request from your code to a GPU and back. The cloud control plane authenticates, applies your privacy rules, and routes — but the model itself runs on hardware you own.
home.step1Body: Members run {agent} next to their local LLM server. The agent advertises whatever models the server is hosting.
home.step2Body: Each agent receives a short-lived Tailscale key and joins our private mesh. No ngrok, no Cloudflare configs, no ports or firewall holes. Just WireGuard.
home.step3Body: Calls to {endpoint} route to an online agent serving the requested model. Streaming works. Latency is direct.
home.feature1Body: A superset of the APIs you already use — OpenAI, NVIDIA NIM, and friends. Swap the base URL and key; your existing SDKs and prompts just work.
home.feature2Body: Members serve the best open-weight models on hardware they own — Qwen, Llama, DeepSeek, LTX — for chat, images, video, speech, and more.
home.feature3Body: Requests reach providers over Tailscale, end-to-end encrypted. No public endpoints to scrape.
home.feature4Body: Connect with passionate local-AI enthusiasts and evangelists. Pool compute with people you trust, and showcase the best results consumer hardware can produce.
home.ctaBody: Sign in, mint a key, and you're live in under a minute. Bring a node whenever you have spare cycles — your hardware is the cloud now.
home.featuredSubtitle: Real requests from members — a showcase of the best results consumer hardware can produce. Click any card to see the full request.

auth.welcomeSubtitle: Sign in with GitHub to continue.
auth.termsAgreement: By continuing, you agree to our {terms} and {privacy}.
auth.anonymousHint: Anonymous sessions get a random name like mighty-hill-hero. No email, nothing that identifies you.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Guides, updates, and ideas on distributed, self-hosted LLM inference.

queue.title: Queue & workflows
queue.subtitle: Queued jobs and the workflows that orchestrate them, updating live.
queue.templatesSubtitle: Pick one, give it a little input, and it generates everything it needs.
queue.workerStalled: Jobs are queued but the worker isn't processing them. Make sure the celery-worker and celery-beat services are running.
queue.asyncDisabled: Async processing isn't enabled on this server (no Redis broker configured), so workflows can't run.
queue.noWorkflows: No workflow runs yet. Launch the demo to see the live DAG.
queue.noJobs: No queued jobs yet. Add async: true to any /v1 request, or submit a batch.
queue.awaitingHint: This run is paused at a human gate — approve or reject a step above to continue.

workflows.title: Workflows
workflows.subtitle: Design, save and reuse your own multi-step generation pipelines.
workflows.empty: No saved workflows yet. Create one from scratch, or fork a template below.
workflows.startFromHint: Fork a curated workflow into the builder and make it your own.
workflows.confirmDelete: Delete this workflow? This can't be undone.

model3d.title: Image to 3D
model3d.subtitle: Turn a single image into a textured 3D model (GLB).
model3d.noModels: No image-to-3D models are available to you yet. Run an agent with a service of type: mesh to add one.
model3d.generating: Generating your 3D model — this usually takes about 30 seconds…
model3d.note: Models are generated on a provider's GPU and stored on inference.club.

picker.title: Pick a source image
picker.description: Choose one of your generated images, something you've saved, or any public image on the network.
picker.fetchFailed: Couldn't load that image — please try another
picker.emptyRecent: You haven't generated any images yet.
picker.emptyStarred: You haven't starred any images yet.
picker.emptyBookmarked: You haven't bookmarked any images yet.
picker.emptyCollections: You don't have any collections yet.

media.musicSubtitle: Your songs and playlists, generated on the network.
media.noSongsYet: You haven't generated any songs yet.
media.videosSubtitle: Your videos and playlists, generated on the network.
media.noVideosYet: You haven't generated any videos yet.
media.notAVideo: This request has no video to play.

sharing.triggerLabel: Visibility and collection for new generations
sharing.appliesEverywhere: Applies to every playground and API request until you change it.
sharing.updateFailed: Failed to save your sharing preference
